channel.title: CodeStrategists Blog
channel.description: Advanced development guidelines, React optimizations, CSS migrations, and Web Security blueprints.

item.title: Base64 Encoding vs Decoding: Binary-to-Text Internals
item.description: An in-depth developer guide to Base64 encoding and decoding. Learn how binary streams are converted to ASCII text, padding calculations, URL-safe variations, and performance considerations.
item.author: Manu Garg

item.title: Best Free Frontend Developer Tools in 2026
item.description: An analysis of the best free frontend developer tools in 2026. Explore performance formatters, code converters, security validators, and local debuggers to improve your productivity.
item.author: Manu Garg

item.title: Common JSON Errors and How to Fix Them: A Linter\
item.description: A comprehensive developer guide to diagnosing and fixing common JSON syntax errors. Learn about quote escaping, trailing commas, parsing rules, and how to write secure try-catch blocks.
item.author: Manu Garg

item.title: CSS to Tailwind CSS Migration: A Practical Refactoring Guide
item.description: A complete developer guide to migrating from CSS to Tailwind CSS. Learn spacing scales, layout mappings, breakpoint systems, custom configurations, and best practices for refactoring legacy styles.
item.author: Manu Garg

item.title: HTML to JSX Conversion: The Complete Developer Guide
item.description: A comprehensive developer guide for HTML to JSX conversion. Learn key syntax differences, attribute mappings, inline style formatting, and how to avoid compilation errors during React migrations.
item.author: Manu Garg

item.title: JSON Formatter vs JSON Validator: Key Differences for Developers
item.description: An in-depth comparison of JSON formatting and validation tools. Learn how parser engines work under the hood, how they differ, and when to use each for clean API debugging.
item.author: Manu Garg

item.title: JWT Authentication: A Deep Dive into Stateless Session Management
item.description: An in-depth developer guide to JWT authentication. Learn token anatomy, signing algorithms, security best practices, and why cookie-based storage beats localStorage.
item.author: Manu Garg

item.title: React Developer Productivity Toolkit: Essential Utilities for 2026
item.description: An analysis of React developer productivity tools for 2026. Learn about custom hook optimization, state management patterns, and workflow utilities.
item.author: Manu Garg

item.title: SVG to React: How to Build a Reusable Icon Component Library
item.description: A complete developer guide to converting SVGs into React components. Learn SVG optimization techniques, camelCase mapping rules, dynamic styling, and how to configure TypeScript icon components.
item.author: Manu Garg

item.title: UUID v4 Explained: Cryptographic Randomness and Collision Math
item.description: An in-depth developer guide to UUID v4. Learn how unique identifiers are structured, the role of Web Crypto APIs, collision probabilities, and database indexing considerations.
item.author: Manu Garg
